entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: A ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ front ସେହି asks ଏକ ଧାରଣା.

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: ସମ୍ଭାବ୍ୟ ଭୁଲ ବିଷୟରେ ସତର୍କ କରୁଥିବା ଏକ ସାଧାରଣ ଫାନ୍ଦ।

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: ଚିନ୍ତାକୁ ପୂରା କରୁଥିବା ସଂକ୍ଷିପ୍ତ ପଛପଟ।

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: ସବୁ କଥା ଖୋଲି ନଦେଇ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରୁଥିବା ଏକ ସଙ୍କେତ।

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: A ସମୀକ୍ଷା choice so missed cards return sooner.

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: ସରଳ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: ଏକ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ କାର୍ଡ ସ୍ମରଣ ମାଗେ:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: A ଉପଯୋଗୀ card asks ଏକ thing. ଏହା ଉଚିତ ନୁହେଁ hide five ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ inside ଏକ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ. ଏହା ଉଚିତ ହେବା specific enough କୁ ଉତ୍ତର, but ନୁହେଁ so narrow ସେହି ଏହା becomes meaningless.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: ଦୁର୍ବଳ AI ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ କହେ:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: ସକ୍ରିୟ ସ୍ମରଣ

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Add ସଙ୍କେତ ଛଡ଼ା giving away the ଉତ୍ତର

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI flashcards ଶୀଘ୍ର କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରିପାରେ, କିନ୍ତୁ ଶିକ୍ଷା ତଥାପି retrieval ରୁ ଆସେ। Tool cards ଲେଖିଦେଲେ ଏବଂ learner କେବେ answer କରିବାକୁ ଯୁଦ୍ଧ କଲେ ନାହିଁ, ପ୍ରାୟ କିଛି ବଦଳେ ନାହିଁ। ଉପଯୋଗୀ version messy notes କୁ focused prompts ରେ ପରିଣତ କରେ, ପରେ answer ଦେଖାଇବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ learner କୁ recall କରାଏ।

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI ପାରେ turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ. ଏହା ପାରେ split ବିସ୍ତୃତ ଧାରଣା into smaller cards, add ଉଦାହରଣ, ଓ identify traps a ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ might miss.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ଓ ସକ୍ରିୟ ସ୍ମରଣ: କିପରି କୁ remember more

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: apply a ଧାରଣା କୁ a ଛୋଟ ଉଦାହରଣ.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ଏକ-ଧାରଣା cards ସହିତ ସଙ୍କେତ ଓ common traps.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Back: "Spacing forces ସ୍ମୃତି କୁ reconstruct the ଉତ୍ତର ପରେ some forgetting, କେଉଁ strengthens later ସ୍ମରଣ."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: ତୁଳନା କରନ୍ତୁ ଦୁଇ ଧାରଣା;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: define a term; ବିଷୟ

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Delete cards ସେହି ହେଉଛି too ବିସ୍ତୃତ କିମ୍ବା obvious.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: ସବୁକିଛିକୁ ସମାନ ଭାବେ ସମୀକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: ସହଜ। ପରେ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ a cause;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ହେଉଛି ଏକ of the simplest ways କୁ do ଏହି.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ହେଉଛି powerful, but ସେମାନେ ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ the whole ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ process. ସେମାନେ ହେଉଛି best ପାଇଁ retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, ଓ key ଉଦାହରଣ. ସେମାନେ ହେଉଛି weaker କେବେ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ has never understood the ଧାରଣା ରେ the ପ୍ରଥମ place.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ work best କେବେ ସେମାନେ test ଏକ ଧାରଣା at a time, reveal ଉତ୍ତର only ପରେ effort, ଓ ସମୀକ୍ଷା missed cards sooner.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: ଅଧିକ ଗଭୀର route ପାଇଁ Flashcard Builder guide ଓ Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ। Goal beautiful deck ନୁହେଁ; goal ହେଉଛି notes ନଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅଧିକ ମନେରଖିବା।

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: ଉଦାହରଣ ସ୍ୱରୂପ:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Front: "କାହିଁକି does ବ୍ୟବଧାନୀୟ ସମୀକ୍ଷା work ଭଲ than cramming?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: କଠିନ। ଛୋଟ ବିଳମ୍ବ ପରେ ସମୀକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: ସଙ୍କେତ: "Think ବିଷୟରେ forgetting ଓ retrieval."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: ସଙ୍କେତ ହେଉଛି ଉପଯୋଗୀ କେବେ ସେମାନେ preserve effort. A bad ସଙ୍କେତ ହେଉଛି the ଉତ୍ତର ରେ disguise. A good ସଙ୍କେତ narrows the search space.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: identify a common ଭୁଲ;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: If a card keeps failing, do ନୁହେଁ only repeat ଏହା. ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କାହିଁକି ଏହା ହେଉଛି କଠିନ. ବ୍ୟବହାର Socratic Instruction କୁ uncover the ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା, ଗଣିତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ କୋଚ୍ ପାଇଁ procedural gaps, କିମ୍ବା the AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଲାଇବ୍ରେରୀ କୁ find a ଭଲ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍ ହେଉଛି designed around ସେହି ସକ୍ରିୟ ସ୍ମରଣ loop: ଗଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ a deck, ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ the front, reveal the ଉତ୍ତର, rate ଆପଣଙ୍କ ସ୍ମରଣ, ଓ ସମୀକ୍ଷା the misses until the ଧାରଣା sticks.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Missed. ସମୀକ୍ଷା soon.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Learners କରୁଥିବା ଏକ ଭୁଲ ହେଉଛି ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ card କୁ ସମାନ ଭାବେ treat କରିବା। କୌଣସି card ତୁରନ୍ତ ଜାଣିଥିଲେ, ଆସନ୍ତାକାଲି ପୁଣି review କରିବା ସମୟ ନଷ୍ଟ କରିପାରେ। Card miss କଲେ, ଏକ ସପ୍ତାହ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କରିବା ବହୁତ ଦେରି ହୋଇପାରେ।

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡକୁ ବୁଝିବା ସହ ଯୋଡ଼ନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Paste a ଛୋଟ chunk of notes into ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: the process plants ବ୍ୟବହାର କୁ ତିଆରି food.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: ସ୍ମରଣକୁ ସତ୍ୟନିଷ୍ଠ ଭାବେ ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: ପଢ଼ା notes feels productive. Remembering them later ହେଉଛି the ବାସ୍ତବ test.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: remember a sequence; ବିଷୟ

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: ପଛ ପଟକୁ ନଦେଖି ସମୀକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ କାର୍ଡରେ ପ୍ରାୟତଃ ଥାଏ:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ skills

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: ସେହି ସଙ୍କେତ helps the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ଆରମ୍ଭ ଛଡ଼ା removing the act of remembering. inspir's ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍ ହେଉଛି designed ପାଇଁ ଏହି reveal-ଓ-rate loop: ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଥମ, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: ସେହି ହେଉଛି କାହିଁକି ସକ୍ରିୟ ସ୍ମରଣ matters. Instead of looking at the ଉତ୍ତର, ଆପଣ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ କୁ pull ଏହା ରୁ ସ୍ମୃତି. The effort strengthens the ସ୍ମୃତି ଓ reveals କ’ଣ still needs work.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: The ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ still has କୁ do the remembering. ସେହି ହେଉଛି the point.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: The second card makes the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ retrieve a relationship, ନୁହେଁ simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus ଉପରେ ଏକ of ଏହିଗୁଡିକ jobs:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: ଏହି does ନୁହେଁ need କୁ ହେବା complicated. The important part ହେଉଛି ସେହି ଆପଣଙ୍କ ସମୀକ୍ଷା schedule responds କୁ ସ୍ମୃତି instead of treating the deck like a static list.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ ଏହା ରେ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍. If ଆପଣ need କୁ ବୁଝନ୍ତୁ the ବିଷୟ ପୂର୍ବରୁ making cards, ଆରମ୍ଭ ରେ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ Anything. If ଆପଣ want pressure ପରେ reviewing cards, move into କ୍ୱିଜ୍ Me ଉପରେ Trivia କିମ୍ବା Viva ଅଭ୍ୟାସ.

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: ନୋଟ୍‌କୁ ଭଲ କାର୍ଡରେ ପରିଣତ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: Turn repeated misses into a ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପାଇଁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ Anything.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: ଏହି ଲୁପ୍ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: ତିନୋଟି ମୂଲ୍ୟାୟନ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: କ’ଣ ହେଉଛି the role of chlorophyll ରେ photosynthesis?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: ଭଲ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ କ’ଣରୁ ହୁଏ

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: AI ଭିତରେ notes paste କଲେ, broad ideas କୁ ସେହି jobs ରେ split କରିବାକୁ କହନ୍ତୁ। 18ଟି specific cards ଥିବା deck, ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକରେ ପୂରା paragraph ଥିବା 5ଟି giant cards ଥିବା deck ଠାରୁ ସାଧାରଣତଃ ଭଲ।

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: AI କେଉଁଠି ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ
